title: lumsanews.it
description: The lumsanews.it article discusses a study co-authored by Fabio Giglietto, a Professor of Internet Studies at the University of Urbino, on how Facebook's platform impacts elections by giving visibility to extremists and conspiracy theorists, directly aligning with his expertise in disinformation and social media analysis.

title: Secondo uno studio dell'università di Urbino l'algoritmo di Facebook ora punisce la politica ufficiale e premia gli estremisti antieuropei. Pd e FdI verso una legge bipartisan sulle piattaforme
snippet: This article from Open, published on January 7, 2026, reports on Professor Fabio Giglietto's study from the University of Urbino, which found that Facebook's algorithm penalizes official political content while boosting anti-European extremist content, highlighting transparency deficits and discussing implications for a bipartisan law on digital platforms.
description: An article from Open.online reporting on Professor Fabio Giglietto's study from the University of Urbino, which found that Facebook's algorithm penalizes official political content while boosting anti-European extremist content.
